968:       if (isNewPoojaProduct) {
969:         const insertPayload = { ...dbPayload } as any;
970:         delete insertPayload.id; // Let database auto-generate a valid UUID
971:         const { error } = await supabase
972:           .from('website_pooja_products')
973:           .insert([insertPayload]);
974:         if (error) throw error;
975:         triggerToast('New Pooja product inserted successfully!');
